parameters.body: ={{ (() => { const action = $json.action; const runId = $json.runId; if (action === 'thumbs_up' || action === 'thumbs_down') { return `UPDATE research_report SET user_rating='${action}' WHERE run_id = (SELECT id FROM research_run WHERE run_id = '${runId}' LIMIT 1)[0].id;`; } else if (action === 'approve') { return `UPDATE research_run SET status = 'completed' WHERE run_id = '${runId}';`; } else if (action === 'reject') { return `UPDATE research_run SET status = 'failed' WHERE run_id = '${runId}';`; } return '-- no action'; })() }}
